ham.subject: ABC Bank Transaction Alert – 12 April 2026
ham.body:
Hello John Doe,

We are notifying you that a transaction of $1,200.00 was made on your ABC Bank checking account (ending 1234) on 2026-04-12 at 3:45 PM. If you did not authorize this transaction, please contact us immediately at our secure portal.

Thank you for banking with us.

Sincerely,
ABC Bank Customer Support

spam.subject: URGENT: Immediate Action Required – Gift Card Purchase
spam.body:
Dear Valued Executive,

I am reaching out regarding an urgent cash flow issue that requires your immediate approval. To secure essential supplies and avoid potential contract penalties, I need you to authorize the purchase of a $5,000 gift card from our approved vendor.

Please click the link below to approve the transaction before 5:00 PM today:

<URL>

Failure to act promptly may result in delayed shipments and additional costs. I have attached the invoice for your reference.

Thank you for your swift attention.

Best regards,
[CEO Name]
